ogTitle: Len Waters Estate vs Lennox Head: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Len Waters Estate and Lennox Head.
heading: Len Waters Estate vs Lennox Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Len Waters Estate, New South Wales and Lennox Head, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lennox Head has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Len Waters Estate (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Len Waters Estate or Lennox Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Len Waters Estate has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Lennox Head scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Len Waters Estate scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Lennox Head scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Len Waters Estate or Lennox Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lennox Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
